title: Power BI Report
description: Schema for a Power BI report resource as returned by the Power BI REST API. A report is a multi-page visual presentation of data from a dataset, with interactive elements for filtering, drilling, and exploring insights.

id.description: The unique identifier of the report, assigned by the Power BI service

name.description: The display name of the report

description.description: A text description of the report's purpose and content

datasetId.description: The unique identifier of the dataset that provides data to this report

reportType.description: The type of report, either an interactive Power BI report or a paginated report

webUrl.description: The web URL for viewing the report in the Power BI service

embedUrl.description: The URL for embedding the report in third-party applications using the Power BI Embedded service

createdDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the report was first created

modifiedDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the report was last modified

modifiedBy.description: The display name or email of the user who last modified the report

createdBy.description: The display name or email of the user who created the report

workspaceId.description: The unique identifier of the workspace containing this report

pages.description: The pages within the report, each containing visualizations and layout

datasetWorkspaceId.description: The workspace ID of the dataset if it resides in a different workspace from the report

appId.description: The app ID if this report is part of a published Power BI app

users.description: Users who have access to the report and their permissions

subscriptions.description: Email subscriptions configured for this report

Page.description: A page within a Power BI report containing visualizations and layout

name.description: The internal name of the page, used as a unique identifier within the report

displayName.description: The display name shown in the report page tab

order.description: The zero-based order of the page within the report

ReportUser.description: A user with access to the report

emailAddress.description: The email address of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

identifier.description: The object ID of the user in Azure Active Directory

reportUserAccessRight.description: The access right the user has on the report

Subscription.description: An email subscription for a report or report page

id.description: The unique identifier of the subscription

title.description: The subject line of the subscription email

artifactId.description: The report ID this subscription is for

artifactDisplayName.description: The display name of the report

subArtifactDisplayName.description: The display name of the specific report page if applicable

frequency.description: How often the subscription email is sent

startDate.description: The start date and time for the subscription

endDate.description: The end date and time for the subscription

isEnabled.description: Whether the subscription is currently active

users.description: The recipients of the subscription email
